title: The Great Gatsby
shortDescription: A story about the young and mysterious millionaire Jay Gatsby and his quixotic passion and obsession with the beautiful former debutante Daisy Buchanan.

authors.name: F. Scott Fitzgerald
authors.bio: Francis Scott Key Fitzgerald was an American novelist, essayist, and short story writer.

shortDescription: A Fiction social science fiction novel and cautionary tale about totalitarianism, mass surveillance, and repressive regimentation.

authors.name: George Orwell
authors.bio: Eric Arthur Blair, better known by his pen name George Orwell, was an English novelist, essayist, journalist and critic.

title: The Hobbit
shortDescription: Bilbo Baggins, a hobbit, is whisked away on an unexpected journey by the wizard Gandalf and a company of thirteen dwarves.

authors.name: J.R.R. Tolkien
authors.bio: John Ronald Reuel Tolkien was an English writer, poet, philologist, and academic.

title: Dune
shortDescription: Paul Atreides adventure on Arrakis in this sci-fi classic.

authors.name: Frank Herbert
authors.bio: Franklin Patrick Herbert Jr. was an American science fiction writer.

authors.name: Yuval Noah Harari
authors.bio: Yuval Noah Harari is an Israeli public intellectual, historian and a professor.

title: The Cat in the Hat
shortDescription: A mischievous cat visits two children on a rainy day.

authors.name: Dr. Seuss
authors.bio: Theodor Seuss Geisel, known as Dr. Seuss, was an American children's author, political cartoonist, illustrator, poet, animator, and filmmaker.

title: The Alchemist
shortDescription: A shepherd's journey to find treasure and discover his destiny.

authors.name: Paulo Coelho
authors.bio: Paulo Coelho is a Brazilian lyricist and novelist, best known for his novel The Alchemist.
